name.description: Specifies the exact name of an Argo CD Application resource to wait for. Mutually exclusive with 'selector'.

namespace.description: Specifies the namespace of the Argo CD Application. If left unspecified, the namespace will be the controller's configured default.

selector.description: Specifies a label selector to match Argo CD Application resources to wait for. Mutually exclusive with 'name'.

waitFor.description: Specifies the conditions to wait for. Valid values are 'health', 'sync', 'operation', 'suspended', and 'degraded'. Health-related conditions (health, suspended, degraded) are OR'd. All other conditions are AND'd. Defaults to ['health', 'sync', 'operation'] when omitted.
